records.ety: [From Lady Impey, who attempted to naturalize the bird in England.]

defs: An Indian crested pheasant of the genus Lophophorus. Several species are known. Called also monaul, monal.
notes: ☞ They are remarkable for the bright color and brilliant matallic hues of their plumage. The best known species (Lophophorus Impeyanus) has the neck of a brilliant metallic red, changing to golden yellow in certain lights.
